title: hordeum distichon var. spontaneum
intro: Hordeum distichon var. spontaneum, also known as wild einkorn wheat or spontaneous two-row barley, is an ancient species of wild grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in relieving digestive issues and reducing inflammation, due to its high content of fiber, vitamins, and minerals. The health benefits of Hordeum distichon var. spontaneum include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve blood sugar control, and support the growth of beneficial gut bacteria. Hordeum distichon var. spontaneum is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil to be used topically, and can also be consumed as a supplement in capsule or powder form.
